name: Transaction Snapshot
description: Capture before/after snapshots of Opera database transactions to learn exact posting patterns. Feeds the import engine registry.

accounting_system.description: Read-only access to Opera SQL SE database — snapshots all tables

config_description: No local settings — reads directly from Opera database.

locking_rules.read_only: All queries use WITH (NOLOCK) — no write operations
locking_rules.snapshot_storage: Local JSON files — no database locking needed

data_stores.description: Captured transaction snapshots as JSON files
